name: Newspaper
author: akellainmotion
description: Serif typography, column layouts, ruled lines, print-inspired editorial design

componentOverrides.button: border-2 border-black rounded-none font-serif font-bold px-6 py-2 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors
componentOverrides.card: border-t-2 border-b border-black rounded-none pt-4 pb-4
componentOverrides.input: border-b-2 border-black rounded-none bg-transparent font-serif focus:border-red-800 px-0 py-2
componentOverrides.link: text-red-900 font-serif underline decoration-1 underline-offset-2 hover:decoration-2
componentOverrides.badge: border border-black rounded-none font-serif font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-0.5
componentOverrides.alert: border-l-4 border-black rounded-none pl-4 py-3 font-serif italic
